subcodes.first_line: Thy missive, which had been addressed to Kalim, was received and perused; however, grievous fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نوشته آنجناب که بکلیم مرقوم شده بود رسید و ملاحظه شد ولکن نفحات حزنیه از
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
